rationale.R1.2: The critique thoroughly identifies and explains multiple logical inconsistencies, providing detailed fixes.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is clearly disclosed regarding prior work citations and assumptions.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the scope of critiquing the AskBot section effectively.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content; the critique is constructive and informative.
rationale.RX.5: While mostly traceable, some claims lack specific sources.
